title.zh: xarray：更新 Dataset 时处理 DataArray tuple 输入
title.en: xarray: handle DataArray tuple inputs during Dataset update

summary.zh: 审查一个 xarray PR：作者在 tuple 输入中把 DataArray 转成 ndarray，以避免 Variable 构造的歧义。
summary.en: Review an xarray PR: the author converts DataArray values in tuple inputs to ndarray to avoid ambiguity while constructing Variables.

reviewTarget.note: Adapted from a real upstream issue for review training. Whether this change should be merged is the question — reach your own conclusion before opening the source links.

pr.title: Normalize DataArray tuple payloads before constructing Variables
pr.author: codegen-agent
body: Dataset.update can receive variables in tuple form, but passing a DataArray as the tuple payload is ambiguous because Variable expects raw data rather than another labeled array object.

This PR normalizes tuple payloads by converting DataArray values with np.asarray before calling Variable(*obj). That gives Variable a plain ndarray and keeps the update path consistent with NumPy-backed inputs.
Added a regression test that updates a Dataset with a chunked DataArray tuple and checks the resulting values are equal. Existing xarray tests pass.

background: xarray DataArray can wrap NumPy arrays or dask arrays. Dask-backed arrays preserve lazy evaluation and chunk metadata.
Dataset.update should preserve the underlying data semantics when possible; reading .values or forcing np.asarray can materialize lazy arrays.
The review context includes the pre-patch tuple-to-Variable conversion excerpt in src-variable.py.

notes: np.asarray(DataArray) materializes the DataArray values. For dask-backed arrays this forces eager computation and loses chunk metadata, which can be a severe performance and memory regression.
The test compares .values, which itself computes lazy data. It proves numeric equality after materialization but cannot detect whether laziness/chunks were preserved.
The safer direction is to use the DataArray's underlying .data when constructing the Variable or otherwise make the ambiguous path explicit without computing values.

learningGoal: 判断修复是否保留 lazy data 和 chunk 语义，而不是只看最终数值相等。

terms.description: 惰性数组的分块信息，用于延迟计算和并行处理。
立即把惰性数据计算成内存数组。
保留底层数组对象，可能是 dask array。
用新变量更新数据集，应该保留变量语义。

behaviorChecks.reviewQuestion: 补丁是否调用 np.asarray 触发计算？
普通路径通过是否足以证明 dask 路径安全？

behaviorChecks.expected: 应保留底层 data 或给出明确迁移路径。
behaviorChecks.reviewQuestion: 补丁是否用 values 语义绕开 API 设计问题？
